# ETHAN PAYTON — Sonic Identity Framework (Living Document)
### 4 tracks analyzed across 1 project(s)

## HOW TO USE THIS DOCUMENT

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **This is a living framework, auto-generated after every Core Drive Matrix run.**
> It supports THREE analytical lenses:
> 1. **Per-Release** — What defines THIS specific track's sonic pocket
> 2. **Per-Project** — What defines THIS project (e.g., ALL LOVE EP) as a body of work
> 3. **Overall Artist** — What defines Ethan Payton's holistic identity across ALL projects

## FLYWHEEL COMPOUNDING

Each release feeds the next dynamically:
1. **Per-Release** flywheels train the algorithm on that track's specific sonic pocket
2. **Per-Project** overlaps create internal cross-pollination within the EP/album
3. **Overall Artist** anchors ensure every NEW project inherits momentum from previous ones

> [!TIP]
> Permanent Anchors are the bridge between projects. A listener who discovers Ethan via one project gets algorithmically tested against all others — because the permanent anchors appear everywhere.
